## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt` — formatted with alejandra
- [ ] `make check` — flake check + example generation builds
- [ ] No hard-coded identity (names/emails/hosts live behind `harus.identity`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
